_notes: Six suggested prompts shown on the AI Assistant empty state. Replace text with customer-specific services and scenarios. icon is an emoji. text is the exact prompt sent to GPT-4o when the card is clicked.

suggestions.text: Why did GitLab go down tonight and what did ZeroOps do about it?
What would happen if SAP AP1 went down during month-end close?
Show me the ROI ZeroOps has delivered this month in numbers
Which incidents required human approval today and why did ZeroOps escalate them?
Which agents are running right now and what are they doing?
What should I focus on in the next shift handover — any risks or trends I should know?
